name: Mom's Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate chips, butter, nuts and vanilla in a large bowl; set aside.
2. Combine remaining ingredients in a heavy large saucepan. Cook over medium-high heat, stirring constantly until mixture comes to a boil.
3. Boil for 8 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Pour hot sugar mixture into bowl with chocolate chips. Beat vigorously by hand until mixture thickens.
5. Pour into buttered 8-inch square pan. Refrigerate until set.
6. Cut into 1-inch squares.
